examples.title: Direct Image Generation
examples.description: Runs the direct image bridge through the same governed preparation and backend resolution boundary.

examples.title: Country Cover Image From ADF
examples.description: Compiles an image-generation-adf request into a local SDXL ComfyUI workflow.

examples.title: Drive Clip Video From ADF
examples.description: Compiles a named-template video-generation-adf request for local ComfyUI execution.

examples.title: Submit Image Generation Job
examples.description: Submits an image-generation-adf request as a first-class generation job for later status polling and artifact collection.

examples.title: Submit Video Generation Job
examples.description: Submits a named-template video-generation-adf request as a first-class generation job for later status polling and artifact collection.

examples.title: Japanese Anniversary Country Song
examples.description: Compiles a music-generation-adf contract into an ACE-Step ComfyUI workflow and generates a Japanese country-style anniversary song with female vocals.

examples.title: Submit Music Generation Job
examples.description: Submits a long-running music generation request as a first-class generation job for later status polling and artifact collection.

examples.title: Get Generation Job
examples.description: Refreshes a persisted generation job from provider history.

examples.title: Wait for Generation Job
examples.description: Waits for a job while preserving client timeout versus provider terminal state.

examples.title: Collect Generation Artifact
examples.description: Copies a verified primary artifact from a succeeded generation job.

examples.title: Media Pipeline Envelope
examples.description: Compatibility sequential pipeline with continue-and-aggregate semantics.

examples.title: Screen Capture
examples.description: Captures a screen image through the isolated capture boundary.

examples.title: Scheduled Anniversary Music Generation
examples.description: Defines a recurring generation-schedule that can periodically submit music generation jobs from a stable ADF contract.
